en: Then the heads of the fathers' houses of the Levites came to Eleazar the priest and to Joshua the son of Nun and to the heads of the fathers' houses of the tribes of the people of Israel.
zh: 那時，利未人的眾族長來到以利亞撒祭司和嫩的兒子約書亞，以及以色列眾支派的族長那裡，

en: And they said to them at Shiloh in the land of Canaan, "The LORD commanded through Moses that we be given cities to dwell in, along with their pasturelands for our livestock."
zh: 在迦南地的示羅對他們說：“耶和華曾經藉著摩西吩咐要給我們城市居住，和城的郊野可以牧放我們的牲畜。”

en: So by command of the LORD the people of Israel gave to the Levites the following cities and pasturelands out of their inheritance.
zh: 於是以色列人照著耶和華所吩咐的，從自己的產業中，把以下這些城市和城的郊野，給了利未人。

en: The lot came out for the clans of the Kohathites. So those Levites who were descendants of Aaron the priest received by lot from the tribes of Judah, Simeon, and Benjamin, thirteen cities.
zh: 首先為哥轄家族抽出籤來：利未支派亞倫祭司的子孫，從猶大支派、西緬支派和便雅憫支派，抽籤得了十三座城。

en: And the rest of the Kohathites received by lot from the clans of the tribe of Ephraim, from the tribe of Dan and the half-tribe of Manasseh, ten cities.
zh: 哥轄其餘的子孫，從以法蓮支派的家族、但支派和瑪拿西半個支派，抽籤得了十座城。

en: The Gershonites received by lot from the clans of the tribe of Issachar, from the tribe of Asher, from the tribe of Naphtali, and from the half-tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.
zh: 革順的子孫，從以薩迦支派的家族、亞設支派、拿弗他利支派和在巴珊的瑪拿西半個支派，抽籤得了十三座城。

en: The Merarites according to their clans received from the tribe of Reuben, the tribe of Gad, and the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.
zh: 米拉利的子孫，按著家族，從流本支派、迦得支派和西布倫支派，得了十二座城。

en: These cities and their pasturelands the people of Israel gave by lot to the Levites, as the LORD had commanded through Moses.
zh: 以色列人照著耶和華吩咐摩西的，藉著抽籤，把這些城市和城的郊野分給利未人。

en: Out of the tribe of the people of Judah and the tribe of the people of Simeon they gave the following cities mentioned by name,
zh: 他們從猶大支派和西緬支派中，把以下這些有提名的城分了

en: which went to the descendants of Aaron, one of the clans of the Kohathites who belonged to the people of Levi; since the lot fell to them first.
zh: 給利未支派、哥轄家族中亞倫的子孫，因為第一籤是他們的。

en: They gave them Kiriath-arba (Arba being the father of Anak), that is Hebron, in the hill country of Judah, along with the pasturelands around it.
zh: 以色列人把猶大山地的基列．亞巴，和它四圍的郊野，給了他們；亞巴是亞衲族的祖宗，基列．亞巴就是希伯崙。

en: But the fields of the city and its villages had been given to Caleb the son of Jephunneh as his possession.
zh: 屬於那城的田地和村莊，他們卻給了耶孚尼的兒子迦勒作產業。

en: And to the descendants of Aaron the priest they gave Hebron, the city of refuge for the manslayer, with its pasturelands, Libnah with its pasturelands,
zh: 以色列人把誤殺人者的避難城希伯崙，和希伯崙的郊野，又把立拿和立拿的郊野給了亞倫祭司的子孫，

en: Jattir with its pasturelands, Eshtemoa with its pasturelands,
zh: 還有雅提珥和雅提珥的郊野，以實提莫和以實提莫的郊野，

en: Holon with its pasturelands, Debir with its pasturelands,
zh: 何崙和何崙的郊野，底璧和底璧的郊野，

en: Ain with its pasturelands, Juttah with its pasturelands, Beth-shemesh with its pasturelands- nine cities out of these two tribes;
zh: 亞因和亞因的郊野，淤他和淤他的郊野，伯．示麥和伯．示麥的郊野，共九座城，都是從這兩個支派分出來的。

en: then out of the tribe of Benjamin, Gibeon with its pasturelands, Geba with its pasturelands,
zh: 又從便雅憫支派中，分給他們基遍和基遍的郊野，迦巴和迦巴的郊野，

en: Anathoth with its pasturelands, and Almon with its pasturelands- four cities.
zh: 亞拿突和亞拿突的郊野，亞勒們和亞勒們的郊野，共四座城。

en: The cities of the descendants of Aaron, the priests, were in all thirteen cities with their pasturelands.
zh: 亞倫子孫眾祭司所有的城，共十三座，還有這些城的郊野。

en: As to the rest of the Kohathites belonging to the Kohathite clans of the Levites, the cities allotted to them were out of the tribe of Ephraim.
zh: 利未支派哥轄子孫的家族，就是哥轄其餘的子孫，抽籤所得的城是從以法蓮支派中分出來的。

en: To them were given Shechem, the city of refuge for the manslayer, with its pasturelands in the hill country of Ephraim, Gezer with its pasturelands,
zh: 以色列人把誤殺人者的避難城，就是在以法蓮山地的示劍和示劍的郊野，給了他們；又把基色和基色的郊野，給了他們；

en: Kibzaim with its pasturelands, Beth-horon with its pasturelands- four cities;
zh: 又有基伯先和基伯先的郊野，伯．和崙和伯．和崙的郊野，共四座城。

en: and out of the tribe of Dan, Elteke with its pasturelands, Gibbethon with its pasturelands,
zh: 又從但支派中，給了他們伊利提基和伊利提基的郊野，基比頓和基比頓的郊野，

en: Aijalon with its pasturelands, Gath-rimmon with its pasturelands- four cities;
zh: 亞雅崙和亞雅崙的郊野，迦特．臨門和迦特．臨門的郊野，共四座城。

en: and out of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Taanach with its pasturelands, and Gath-rimmon with its pasturelands- two cities.
zh: 又從瑪拿西半個支派中，給了他們他納和他納的郊野，迦特．臨門和迦特．臨門的郊野，共兩座城。

en: The cities of the clans of the rest of the Kohathites were ten in all with their pasturelands.
zh: 哥轄子孫其餘的家族所有的城共十座，還有這些城的郊野。

en: And to the Gershonites, one of the clans of the Levites, were given out of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with its pasturelands, the city of refuge for the manslayer, and Beeshterah with its pasturelands- two cities;
zh: 以色列人又從瑪拿西半個支派中，把誤殺人者的避難城，就是在巴珊的哥蘭，和哥蘭的郊野，給了利未人的家族中革順的子孫；又給了他們比．施提拉和比．施提拉的郊野，共兩座城。

en: and out of the tribe of Issachar, Kishion with its pasturelands, Daberath with its pasturelands,
zh: 又從以薩迦支派中，給了他們基善和基善的郊野，大比拉和大比拉的郊野，

en: Jarmuth with its pasturelands, En-gannim with its pasturelands- four cities;
zh: 耶末和耶末的郊野，隱．干寧和隱．干寧的郊野，共四座城。

en: and out of the tribe of Asher, Mishal with its pasturelands, Abdon with its pasturelands,
zh: 又從亞設支派中，給了他們米沙勒和米沙勒的郊野，押頓和押頓的郊野，

en: Helkath with its pasturelands, and Rehob with its pasturelands- four cities;
zh: 黑甲和黑甲的郊野，利合和利合的郊野，共四座城。

en: and out of the tribe of Naphtali, Kedesh in Galilee with its pasturelands, the city of refuge for the manslayer, Hammoth-dor with its pasturelands, and Kartan with its pasturelands- three cities.
zh: 以色列人又從拿弗他利支派中，把誤殺人者的避難城，就是在加利利的基低斯和基低斯的郊野，給了他們；又給他們哈末．多珥和哈末．多珥的郊野，加珥但和加珥但的郊野，共三座城。

en: The cities of the several clans of the Gershonites were in all thirteen cities with their pasturelands.
zh: 革順人按著家族所有的城共十三座，還有這些城的郊野。

en: And to the rest of the Levites, the Merarite clans, were given out of the tribe of Zebulun, Jokneam with its pasturelands, Kartah with its pasturelands,
zh: 其餘的利未人，米拉利的子孫的家族，從西布倫支派中分得約念和約念的郊野，加珥他和加珥他的郊野，

en: Dimnah with its pasturelands, Nahalal with its pasturelands- four cities;
zh: 丁拿和丁拿的郊野，拿哈拉和拿哈拉的郊野，共四座城。

en: and out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer with its pasturelands, Jahaz with its pasturelands,
zh: 又從流本支派中，給了他們比悉和比悉的郊野，雅雜和雅雜的郊野，

en: Kedemoth with its pasturelands, and Mephaath with its pasturelands- four cities;
zh: 基底莫和基底莫的郊野，米法押和米法押的郊野，共四座城。

en: and out of the tribe of Gad, Ramoth in Gilead with its pasturelands, the city of refuge for the manslayer, Mahanaim with its pasturelands,
zh: 以色列人又從迦得支派中，把誤殺人者的避難城，就是在基列的拉末和拉末的郊野，給了他們；又給他們瑪哈念和瑪哈念的郊野，

en: Heshbon with its pasturelands, Jazer with its pasturelands- four cities in all.
zh: 希實本和希實本的郊野，雅謝和雅謝的郊野，共四座城。

en: As for the cities of the several Merarite clans, that is, the remainder of the clans of the Levites, those allotted to them were in all twelve cities.
zh: 利未人其餘的家族，就是米拉利的子孫，按著家族抽籤所得的城，共有十二座。

en: The cities of the Levites in the midst of the possession of the people of Israel were in all forty-eight cities with their pasturelands.
zh: 在以色列人的地業中，利未人所得的城共四十八座，還有這些城的郊野。

en: These cities each had its pasturelands around it. So it was with all these cities.
zh: 這些城周圍都有自己的郊野，每一座都是這樣。

en: Thus the LORD gave to Israel all the land that he swore to give to their fathers. And they took possession of it, and they settled there.
zh: 這樣，耶和華就把他從前起誓要賜給他們列祖的全地給了以色列人；以色列人佔領了那地，就定居下來。

en: And the LORD gave them rest on every side just as he had sworn to their fathers. Not one of all their enemies had withstood them, for the LORD had given all their enemies into their hands.
zh: 耶和華照著他向他們列祖起誓所說的一切話，使他們四境平靜；他們所有的仇敵，沒有一人能在他們面前站立得住；耶和華把他們所有的仇敵都交在他們手裡。

en: Not one word of all the good promises that the LORD had made to the house of Israel had failed; all came to pass.
zh: 耶和華向以色列家應許賜福的話，沒有一句落空，都應驗了。
